title: paul russells 850W Black with Chrome accent 2-Slice Kitchen Toaster – 7 step Browning Controls, Defrost, Reheat, Cancel Functions, LED Indicator, Cord Storage, Removable Crumb Tray – Fast Toasting
features: Versatile Bread Accommodation: Paul Russells 850W Black electric toaster has two extra-wide slots that cater to a variety of bread types, from crumpets to thick slices, ensuring a delightful toasting experience.

Convenient Functions: Benefit from 3 dedicated modes – Reheat, Defrost, and Cancel. Effortlessly revive frozen bread or stop any program with the convenient Cancel button. Enjoy precise control with 7 browning settings, allowing you to personalise your toast to the perfect level of crispiness.

Automatic Lift-Up and Shut-Off: Experience hands-free operation with Paul Russells black toaster as toast slices are automatically raised, and the toaster switches off when the toasting process is complete. The self-centering feature ensures even toasting for every slice.

Comprehensive Functionality: Beyond toasting, this appliance offers a reheat setting for cooled toast and a defrost function for frozen bread. The removable crumb tray facilitates easy cleaning, preventing any mess.

Longevity With Powerful Performance: Paul Russells offers a 3-year extended warranty (Subject to website registration). It operates at 220-240V 50/60Hz with a maximum power of 850 watts. The UK main plug ensures convenience, making it a versatile and reliable addition to your kitchen.
description: Product Description Our 2-slot toaster is versatile, accommodating items up to 1 inch thick. Whether you're toasting bread, bagels, waffles, or English muffins, each slot is designed to handle various options for a convenient and enjoyable toasting experience. One-step defrosting thaws frozen bread, the reheating function warms cold slices, and the cancel feature halts heating at any time. Efficiently designed to simplify bread preparation, ensuring convenience with defrost, reheat, and cancel options. The quick-check lever effortlessly lifts food during toasting, allowing a seamless check for browning without disrupting the cycle. It simplifies the removal of perfectly toasted items when they're ready. Select from seven browning options, ranging from crispy to very crispy, to customize your desired texture. This variable feature allows you to tailor your preferences, ensuring the perfect level of crispiness for your enjoyment. Maintain countertop neatness with convenient bottom storage for cords, ensuring a tidy and organized kitchen space. Before cleaning your toaster, begin with the crumb tray. Empty its crumbs into the bin and wash it with warm, soapy water. While it dries, use a soft brush to remove any lingering crumbs.
